microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **resilience validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows across enterprise AEC-scale customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact**.

Led **0→1 solution design** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable deployment model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability by architecting a rack-level drill program delivered in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation framework adopted org-wide.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across IT, security, and infrastructure stakeholders.

Scaled team leverage through **AI-driven automation**, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows that reduced planning cycle time by 39% and increased drill capacity by 21%, directly expanding solution delivery throughput.

Designed and delivered technical presentations and solution briefings for senior engineering and business stakeholders, translating complex cloud-infrastructure recovery architectures into clear **business-value narratives** aligned to enterprise customer outcomes.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting technical demos and hands-on training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through smarter tooling integration.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure engineering teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating field feedback into prioritized, delivery-ready requirements.

Optimized data integrity and technical retrieval pipelines by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform, cutting average lookup time by 83% and improving solution discoverability across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating dependencies and deployment sequencing across 140+ engineering teams.

Mobilized a solution strategy to eliminate operational toil during cloud region launches, conducting discovery sessions with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort per region** and building a phased roadmap to automate critical deployment paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to visualize operational toil and automation coverage across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify high-impact gaps and prioritize platform investments that directly supported faster, more reliable region deployments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by architecting the full transition strategy, mapping software and hardware dependencies across 1,200+ stations and coordinating phased rollout with cross-functional engineering teams.

Facilitated Agile sprint ceremonies and managed backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority integration tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and accelerating feature delivery timelines for a robotics platform serving warehouse-scale deployments.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, reducing deployment cycle time by 25% and establishing a repeatable software release process for distributed embedded-systems infrastructure.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end sales operations workflow, managing scoping, estimating, and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals through a newly implemented CRM system that standardized the full customer lifecycle.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing SEO, Google Business presence, and landing page UX to better align messaging with target customer segments.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting a financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks through data-driven recommendations that directly informed seasonal pricing and resource allocation strategy.

tailoring_notes: 'Solution design' and 'technical consulting' from the JD's Requirements section woven into microsoft_ft bullet 2 ('0→1 solution design') and amazon_robotics bullet 1 ('architecting the full transition strategy').

'Business value' framing from the JD's 'Solve problems' responsibility mirrored in microsoft_ft bullet 6 ('business-value narratives aligned to enterprise customer outcomes') and microsoft_2022 bullet 1 ('accelerated revenue... faster deployments').

'Technical demonstrations' and 'present to technical and non-technical customers' from the JD's 'Tell our story' responsibility directly surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet 6 ('technical presentations and solution briefings for senior engineering and business stakeholders').

'Integrating software solutions with other business systems including BI, CRM, ERP' from Recommended Qualifications echoed in skills_priority ordering and pro_painters bullet 1 (CRM lifecycle) and bullet 3 (data-driven pricing/analytics).

'AI/machine learning concepts' from Recommended Qualifications addressed in microsoft_2023 bullet 3 ('AI-powered semantic search') and microsoft_ft bullet 5 ('AI-driven automation... AI agent'), positioning Cyrus as already delivering on that preferred skill.
